T0278.title: Troll Farm
T0278.definition: Sock puppet armies are organized groups of fake accounts hired by black market operators or marketing agencies to post specific content online in a coordinated manner.
T0278.description: Controlled through group management systems, these armies mass-post positive reviews, launch coordinated harassment attacks, or steer public opinion on social platforms. They are typically paid per post or task and serve as a core tool for manipulating public opinion, smearing competitors, and conducting online extortion schemes. In lead generation scenarios, they often pose as genuine users to create a bandwagon effect and lure real users into traps.
